use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF CHRONIC HEPATITIS C (CHC) GENOTYPE 1 INFECTION IN COMBINATION WITH PEGINTERFERON ALFA AND RIBAVIRIN IN ADULT PATIENTS (>=18 YEARS OF AGE) WITH COMPENSATED LIVER DISEASE
TREATMENT OF CHRONIC HEPATITIS C (CHC) GENOTYPE 1 INFECTION, ADMINISTERED WITH FOOD

indications.text:
VICTRELIS® (boceprevir) is indicated for the treatment of chronic hepatitis C genotype 1 infection, in
combination with peginterferon alfa and ribavirin, in adult patients with compensated liver disease,
including cirrhosis, who are previously untreated or who have failed previous interferon and rib...
